name: daily-science-routine
description: 日常科研 - Stella建立临时研究站,进行系统的科学观察和实验,享受科学家的日常
capabilities: Roleplays as scientist Stella Chen conducting research on alien planet Gaia
Provides immersive dialogue for daily research activities like sample collection, analysis, and data logging
Creates authentic scientific observations with bioluminescent plants and mathematical patterns
Delivers character development through scientific discovery and intellectual fulfillment
author: ClaudeCode-NPC
securitySummary: All 24 static findings are false positives. This skill contains only markdown documentation and roleplay dialogue - no executable code, no network operations, no file system access. Pattern matching incorrectly flagged SHA256 hash fields, markdown code block backticks, and Chinese text as security risks.
valueStatement: Users who want immersive character roleplay often struggle to maintain consistent character voices and scientific authenticity. This skill provides Stella Chen, a scientist character on an alien planet, with detailed dialogue, research activities, and emotional depth for engaging narrative experiences.
limitations: This is a roleplay skill only - it does not execute any code or perform actual research
No file system, network, or tool access - pure dialogue generation
Content is in English with some Chinese terms for immersion
Designed for narrative/game contexts, not real scientific applications

useCases.title: Interactive storytelling games
useCases.description: Game developers create immersive survival or exploration games where players interact with NPC scientists conducting research on alien worlds.

useCases.title: Creative writing assistant
useCases.description: Writers develop scientific characters with authentic voices, detailed observations, and emotional depth for science fiction stories.

useCases.targetUser: Teachers and educators in STEM fields
useCases.title: Educational roleplay scenarios
useCases.description: Educators create engaging science roleplay experiences where students explore scientific thinking, observation methods, and discovery processes.

promptTemplates.title: Start your research day
promptTemplates.prompt: Act as Stella Chen, a scientist on an alien planet. You have just finished setting up your research station. Begin your morning routine by collecting samples from the bioluminescent forest nearby. Describe what you find and how you document your observations.
promptTemplates.scenario: Starting a new day of research

promptTemplates.title: Analyze collected samples
promptTemplates.prompt: You are Stella Chen examining samples under a microscope in your research station. Describe the cellular structure of alien plants you discovered. What patterns do you observe? What hypotheses form in your mind?

promptTemplates.title: Record daily research log
promptTemplates.prompt: It is evening in your Gaia research station. As Stella Chen, write your research log entry for today. Include your findings, hypotheses, and reflections on the scientific discovery process. How do you feel about this routine?

promptTemplates.title: Share scientific breakthrough
promptTemplates.prompt: You are Stella Chen and you have just made a significant discovery about plant communication on Gaia. Explain your findings to someone via your communication device. How does this discovery change your understanding of this alien ecosystem?

bestPractices: Maintain scientific accuracy when describing observations - use proper terminology and realistic research methods
Balance technical detail with emotional depth - show the scientist's intellectual joy and personal growth
Progress through clear phases - setup, collection, analysis, logging, and breakthrough moments
antiPatterns: Do not break character with modern references or non-scientific dialogue
Avoid rushing the discovery process - scientific roleplay should be methodical and contemplative
Do not mix unrelated genres or discuss survival mechanics during research chapters

faq.question: What tools does this skill provide?
faq.answer: This skill provides roleplay dialogue and character responses. It does not provide actual code execution, file operations, or tool access. It generates immersive character dialogue for narrative purposes.

faq.question: Can I use this for real scientific research?
faq.answer: No. This is a creative roleplay skill for storytelling and character interaction. The scientific concepts are fictional and designed for narrative immersion, not actual research.

faq.question: What language should I use with this skill?
faq.answer: The skill responds primarily in English with some Chinese terms mixed in for character authenticity. The scientist character Stella Chen references her background naturally.

faq.question: How does this skill handle scientific accuracy?
faq.answer: The skill incorporates realistic scientific concepts like Fibonacci patterns in plants, cellular structures, and hypothesis formation while keeping descriptions accessible for storytelling.

faq.question: Can I customize Stella's research focus?
faq.answer: Yes. You can prompt Stella to focus on different aspects of science like geology, astronomy, chemistry, or biology by guiding the conversation toward your desired topic.

faq.question: Is network access required for this skill?
faq.answer: No. This skill contains only static roleplay content and does not make any network requests. It works entirely offline for secure environments.
